data.description: ICC: Special session of the Assembly on disciplinary proceedings involving Chief Prosecutor Karim Khan to begin

data.title: North Dallas Bank & Trust Co. Announces Second Quarter Earnings
data.description: Dallas-based North Dallas Bank & Trust Co. (NDBT), founded in 1961, recently disclosed their financial results. For the three-month period ending on June 30, 2026, the bank reported net earnings of $2,716,912, equating to $1.06 per share. Additionally, for the six-month period ending on the same date, they reported net earnings of $4,520,348, translating to $1.76 per share. This independent community bank continues to showcase strong financial performance in the market.

data.title: Key interest rate peaks in Trump's second term as 10-year Treasury bond yield rises amid Iran conflict and AI investment.
data.description: The yield on the 10-year Treasury bond has shown a consistent increase over the course of this year. This rise comes amidst the ongoing conflict in Iran, growing concerns over government expenditure, and a surge in artificial intelligence investments that are fueling economic growth.

data.title: New rates revealed by Trump for Section 301 tariffs target multiple countries after Supreme Court ruling.
data.description: The president has introduced a new intricate plan to proceed with his trade conflict, following the Supreme Court's rejection of his initial tariffs.

data.title: Europe faces deadline to stop Russian gas imports by Jan. 1, leading to concerns about growing reliance on US energy.
data.description: Concerns are growing among Europeans about an increasing reliance on American energy sources. Despite a deadline of January 1st to cease imports of liquefied natural gas from Russia, the fear of becoming dependent on American energy remains prevalent.

data.title: Mobix Labs Drone Acquisition of Vision Aerial Accelerates National Security Platform
data.description: In Irvine, California, Mobix Labs recently acquired Vision Aerial, a move that accelerates their national security platform within the Aerial Intelligence sector. This acquisition signifies progress for Mobix Labs in strengthening their capabilities, reflecting a significant step forward in their strategic growth plan. The move is expected to enhance their position in the industry and further establish their presence in the market.

data.title: Hindustan Zinc Reports Record Q1 Net Profit of US$ 578 Million, Up 145% YoY; Highest-Ever EBITDA Driven by Strong Production and Lowest Cost of Production
data.description: In Udaipur, India, Hindustan Zinc Limited, the top integrated zinc and silver producers globally, started FY27 with a record-breaking first-quarter performance.

data.title: Meta Launches Seller App For Facebook Marketplace. EBay Stock Falls.
data.description: Following the announcement of Meta's plan to introduce a Seller app for Facebook Marketplace, Meta stock experienced a slight decrease in value, while eBay stock saw a more significant decline. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: SpaceX Delays Starship Test Flight Due To Weather. Stock Continues To Slide.
data.description: SpaceX has postponed the test launch of its Starship for the second occasion. The company's stock has been experiencing a decline since its initial public offering, with shares dropping by approximately 1% on Friday. The delay was attributed to weather conditions.

data.title: Oracle Stock Gets Much-Needed Boost From Pentagon Software Deal
data.description: The value of Oracle's stock witnessed a rise following the enterprise technology firm securing a lucrative software contract with the Pentagon. This deal provided a significant boost to Oracle's stock performance, marking a positive development for the company.

data.title: The Value Of Trust Is Enormous — But Takes Time To Appear
data.description: The importance of trust cannot be underestimated, as it is vital for ensuring success in any endeavor. Building trust may seem intangible initially, but its impact becomes significantly tangible over time. This underscores the enormous value that trust holds in various aspects of life and business.

data.title: Is SpaceX Stake Google's Artificial Intelligence Piggy Bank?
data.description: Alphabet's investment in Elon Musk's SpaceX poses a significant challenge for Google's stock. The question arises whether Google will offload its SpaceX holdings to fuel its rising expenditure on artificial intelligence (AI). This dilemma raises concerns about whether SpaceX is considered Google's primary source for AI investment.

data.title: Verizon Earnings Beat But Revenue Light Amid Lower Phone Upgrades
data.description: In the second quarter, Verizon exceeded earnings expectations. They also acquired more "postpaid" phone subscribers than anticipated. However, their revenue did not meet projections. Despite this, the company demonstrated a strong performance with increased numbers of new subscribers and beat earnings estimates for the quarter.
